questionHtml:
Under certain conditions, living organisms on Earth produce and release methane. What favours the production of methane?

A. Forest fires

B. High light intensity

C. Anaerobic conditions

D. Dry conditions

meta.title: Under certain conditions, living organisms on Earth produce and release methane. What favours the production of methane? A. Forest fires B. High light intensity C. Anaerobic condit
breadcrumbLabels: D4.3.2. Positive feedback cycles in global warming
